news.summary: Progress is being made in the development of innovative Antibody Drug Conjugates (ADCs) containing immune-oncology payloads for the treatment of various types of cancer tumors. These ADCs have shown promising results in targeting cancer cells and delivering treatment directly to the affected areas. The research aims to address the growing need for more effective and targeted therapies in oncology. This development could potentially benefit patients with different types of cancer, with an estimated number of around 18.1 million new cancer cases being diagnosed globally each year. This advancement in ADC technology has the potential to revolutionize cancer treatment and improve outcomes for a significant number of cancer patients worldwide.
news.headline: Akari Therapeutics progressing ADC development for cancer treatment; Q1 2025 financial results released.

news.summary: In Bonita Springs, Florida, e2Companies LLC ("e2"), a prominent company offering solutions for on-site power generation and energy optimization, shared that its Founder and CEO, James Richmond, has been chosen as a finalist for the Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Florida Award. This program, now in its 40th year, recognizes innovative leaders who create change in markets globally. Congratulations to James Richmond for this achievement.
news.headline: CEO James Richmond of e2Companies chosen as Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Florida finalist, honored by Ernst & Young LLP.

news.summary: In California, Step, a fintech company, introduced Step Mobile, a new service that aims to enhance the financial prospects of the youth. This offering enables users to save up to $600 annually. As the initial American fintech to enter the mobile market, Step is broadening its scope beyond banking by providing practical tools to assist young individuals in confidently transitioning into adulthood. The service includes budget-friendly phone plans and other beneficial features.
news.headline: Step launches Step Mobile offering at $15/month, puts up to $600 back in users' pockets, targeting Gen Z.

news.summary: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) has unveiled its new Europe Advanced Battery Testing Laboratory in Aachen, Germany, aimed at testing batteries for electric vehicles (EVs) and large-scale energy storage setups. The laboratory represents a strategic move to enhance the company's existing battery technology testing services while also strengthening its presence in Europe. The facility, constructed specifically for this purpose, is a response to the growing need for dependable battery testing services. This development significantly bolsters UL Solutions Inc.'s capabilities in this field.
news.headline: UL Solutions opens Europe Advanced Battery Testing Lab in Germany, expanding battery testing for EVs. Increasing demand leads to the new facility's development.

news.summary: A biotechnology company, BrainChild Bio, Inc., based in Seattle and Cambridge, is working on CAR T-cell therapies for CNS tumor treatment. They recently disclosed that their autologous CAR T-cell therapy targeting B7-H3 has obtained RMAT designation from the FDA. This therapy aims to address diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma (DIPG), a fatal pediatric brain tumor. This recognition highlights the therapy's potential for aiding DIPG patients, a promising step in advancing treatment options for this challenging condition.
news.headline: FDA designates B7-H3 CAR T-cell therapy for DIPG as Regenerative Medicine Advanced Therapy; developed by BrainChild Bio.

news.summary: Cincinnati & New York - The E.W. Scripps Company (NASDAQ: SSP) has teamed up with FreeWheel, a leading global technology platform in the TV advertising sector, to enhance advertising avenues for women's live sports content on ION, Scripps' national sports and entertainment network accessible to all U.S. TV households both over-the-air and through major pay TV and connected TV services. This collaboration aims to offer viewers the thrill of WNBA and NWSL games in addition to exclusive original programming.
news.headline: Scripps collaborates with Freewheel to boost women's sports advertising on ION network, targeting WNBA/NWSL, reaching all US households.
US Secretary of State Rubio and the German Foreign Minister discussed Iran and Russia-Ukraine.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 15, 2025, RyboDyn, a leading dark genome biotech firm, announced a strengthened collaboration with a renowned cancer immunotherapy center. The partnership aims to validate innovative oncology targets and progress initial therapies that stand out in the field. This development signifies a significant step forward for RyboDyn and the cancer research community, reflecting the importance of advancing cutting-edge approaches in addressing cancer.
news.headline: RyboDyn strengthens cancer immunotherapy collaboration with Moffitt Cancer Center to validate new targets.

news.summary: A senior living company in Tulsa, Oklahoma has achieved its 8th consecutive Great Place to Work® certification. This accomplishment is noteworthy as the senior living industry grapples with staffing difficulties. The company stands out with 98% of associates participating in the certification process. This success marks the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment without relying on superficial tactics.
news.headline: Senior Star earns 8th Great Place to Work® certification with 98% associate participation, leading with love in industry.

news.summary: In Washington, utilities and businesses have successfully repurposed 18.1 billion cubic meters of water starting from 2019, thanks to innovative solutions provided by Xylem, a prominent global leader in water technology.
news.headline: Advanced technologies from Xylem have enabled the reuse of 18.1 billion cubic meters of water by utilities and businesses since 2019.

news.summary: Rubicon Carbon, a prominent carbon credit management company based in Marina del Rey, California, has recently finalized a framework agreement with Microsoft. This partnership involves the acquisition of an impressive 18 million tonnes of top-notch carbon removal credits. It stands out as one of the most significant single-buyer commitments globally. The deal includes individual Afforestation, Reforestation, and Revegetation (ARR) projects structured as 15- to 20-year offtakes. This partnership signifies Microsoft's substantial investment in carbon reduction efforts.
news.headline: Rubicon Carbon partners with Microsoft for purchase of 18M tons of carbon credits, a significant environmental commitment.
GERMAN INTERIOR MINISTER DOBRINDT SAYS VULNERABLE GROUPS SEEKING REFUGE IN GERMANY WILL NOT BE EXPELLED AT BORDER

news.summary: In new statistics released today, it was revealed that unemployment rates have dropped to a record low of 3.8%, with an impressive 220,000 jobs added in the last month alone. This data indicates a strong and growing economy, with a significant increase in job opportunities and a decrease in joblessness. Experts predict that this trend will continue in the coming months, further boosting the country's economic prosperity. Additionally, the stock market has seen a remarkable increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points, reaching an all-time high of 35,000. This positive economic outlook is projected to have a far-reaching impact on various sectors, such as consumer spending and business investments.
news.headline: Food company reports Q1 2025 financial results, showing impressive numbers.

news.summary: A retrospective analysis of U.S. commercial claims data has revealed that patients prescribed AUVI-Q experienced lower rates of inpatient hospitalization for anaphylaxis compared to those prescribed other epinephrine auto-injectors. The study evaluated data from 2023, including 10,130 AUVI-Q patients and 52,094 other EAI patients. Results showed that in the AUVI-Q cohort, the rate of anaphylaxis-related inpatient hospitalizations was 39 per 100,000 patients, a 23.81% reduction compared to the Other EAI cohort's rate of 52 per 100,000 patients. Additionally, the hospitalization rate per anaphylaxis event was significantly lower for AUVI-Q (0.00153) compared to Other EAIs (0.00367), representing a 58.24% relative reduction. The study was presented at the ISPOR 2025 North America Conference in Montreal. AUVI-Q provides guidance for administering epinephrine in allergic emergencies.
news.headline: Retrospective analysis finds AUVI-Q lowers anaphylaxis hospitalizations compared to other EAIs; 23.81% rate reduction.
US Secretary of State Rubio met with the German Foreign Minister at the Turkey NATO meeting.

news.summary: Preliminary data from early clinical trials show that existing and therapy-triggered anti-Ad5 neutralizing antibodies do not affect the safety and efficacy of PCRX-201.
news.headline: Pacira presents data on PCRX-201 for knee osteoarthritis; anti-Ad5 antibodies don't affect safety/effectiveness.

news.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) based in Boca Raton, FL, revealed on May 15, 2025, that it has acquired 16,447 Solana tokens (SOL) with an average buying price of $139.66, amounting to about $2.3 million. The current market evaluation of these tokens stands at around $2.9 million.
news.headline: DeFi Development Corp purchases 16,447 SOL for $2.3 million, now a leading Solana treasury company.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDTX), a biotech firm leveraging its Cloudbreak ® platform for drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) therapeutics, revealed it will hold a virtual R&D day on May 22, 2025, from 10:00 to 11:30 AM ET. Registration link is available for interested participants.
news.headline: Cidara Therapeutics discusses CD388 as universal flu prevention on May 22, 2025, at virtual R&D day.

news.summary: A specialized multi-site ecommerce platform has been developed for a high-end leather goods brand. This platform offers top-tier shopping experiences and versatility across both direct-to-consumer (DTC) and business-to-business (B2B) storefronts. The brand can now provide a premium shopping experience for customers while efficiently catering to both consumer and business needs.
news.headline: Moore & Giles enhances customer experience with a custom multi-site ecommerce platform; offering premium shopping and flexibility.

news.summary: A new study reveals that approximately 1 in 4 teenagers are experiencing symptoms of anxiety worldwide, with the number rising to 30% among girls. This research, conducted on over 10,000 teenagers, also found that 1 in 7 teens are dealing with severe anxiety. The study suggests a need for increased awareness and support for mental health among adolescents.
news.headline: Joe Verschleiser has been named Chief Growth and Performance Officer at American Oncology Network.
Historic achievement as Horizon Aircraft successfully transitions to forward flight mode. #milestone #aviation

news.summary: Reflect Scientific has moved to the OTCIQ platform to improve communication with investors and facilitate expansion. This transition aims to provide better support for the growth of the company.
news.headline: Reflect Scientific moves from OTCQB to OTCIQ for improved communication and growth opportunities.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, K2 OCONUS, a division of K2 Insurance Services, has launched MissionGuard, a new insurance solution for U.S. government and non-government contractors operating overseas. This offering expands their services beyond Defense Base Act (DBA) Insurance. MissionGuard allows organizations to tailor their coverage to match individual risk profiles and contract needs. This move enables greater flexibility in insurance options for contractors abroad.
news.headline: K2 OCONUS introduces MissionGuard for U.S. contractors abroad, expanding beyond DBA Insurance.

news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel, Cognyte's Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer are set to participate in a fireside discussion at the TD Cowen Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on May 28, 2025, starting at 10:15 am Eastern Time.
news.headline: Cognyte to participate in 53rd Annual TD Cowen Technology, Media and Telecom Conference on May 28, 2025, at 10:15 am ET.

news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey on May 15, 2025, leading pharmaceutical company Amneal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMRX) disclosed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the green light for Brekiya ® (dihydroergotamine mesylate) injection. This approval marks a significant milestone as it is the initial and sole dihydroergotamine (DHE) autoinjector designed for the immediate alleviation of migraine with or without aura and cluster headaches in adult patients. This development holds promise for individuals struggling with these conditions, potentially impacting a sizable population across the U.S. 1,2
news.headline: Amneal receives FDA approval for Brekiya® injection for acute migraine/cluster treatment in adults. Important numbers: Nasdaq: AMRX, May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Horizon3.ai, a prominent company specializing in offensive security, has recently achieved Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) High Authorization in San Francisco. This significant accomplishment enables them to cater to extremely security-sensitive federal missions. The attainment of this milestone signifies Horizon3.ai's dedication to delivering evidence-based security solutions to government agencies adhering to the highest levels of compliance and risk exposure. This authorization empowers Horizon3.ai to extend their services to a wider range of clients in the federal sector, ensuring enhanced security measures are in place.
news.headline: Horizon3.ai ensures security with FedRAMP High Authorization, meeting standards for federal missions.

news.summary: In Dover, Delaware on May 15, 2025, Infobase, a top provider of information literacy solutions, introduced a unique program called Texas into the Future. The initiative aims to assist libraries and districts in Texas facing financial hurdles. This program comes in light of the recently revealed funding challenges. Texas into the Future provides essential support and resources to help navigate through these difficulties.
news.headline: Infobase's "Texas into the Future" program aids libraries & districts in Texas facing funding cuts.

news.summary: A new initiative known as the Powering Missouri Growth Plan has been introduced in St. Louis on May 15, 2025. The plan, put forth by Ameren Missouri, a subsidiary of Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE), is designed to provide reliable service to large businesses while ensuring fair and reasonable rates for all customers. As part of this plan, Ameren Missouri has submitted a proposal to the Missouri Public Service Commission. This initiative aims to support the state's economic growth and development by meeting the energy needs of large businesses while prioritizing affordability and fairness for all customers.
news.headline: Ameren Missouri initiates Powering Missouri Growth Plan to boost state's economy with lower rates.

news.summary: A recent study, conducted in partnership with the Philippine Department of Tourism, reveals a significant 21% increase in the nation's overall wellness market from 2019 to 2023. The Global Wellness Institute (GWI), a prominent research entity, facilitated this research. The findings were published on May 15, 2025, based in Miami.
news.headline: Global Wellness Institute research shows Philippines' wellness economy at $43.3 billion, with 21% growth from 2019-2023.

news.summary: The renowned granola brand, Struesli, is now exclusively offered at Erewhon in Newtown, Connecticut as a topping for all Tonic Bar offerings. The innovative addition of Struesli aims to enhance flavor, increase nutritional value, and promote a healthy lifestyle. This partnership was officially announced on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: Struesli Organic Granola chosen as exclusive partner for Erewhon Tonic Bars, enhancing flavor & nutrition.

news.summary: Executives in the voluntary benefits sector anticipate continued robust performance in the future, with a majority expressing contentment with their company's expansion and financial success. These sentiments remain prominent despite worries of declining profitability stemming from rising costs. The positive outlook was shared during a recent meeting in AVON, Conn. on May 15, 2025. Key figures in the industry predict that voluntary business will continue to thrive, reflecting the current satisfaction and confidence among leaders in the field.
news.headline: Exec report shows positive outlook for voluntary benefits market with strong growth & profitability, despite concerns.

news.summary: A major global Human Capital Management solutions provider, ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), has announced an upcoming Investor Day scheduled for Thursday, June 12, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. This event will feature discussions led by senior management regarding key strategies and developments.
news.headline: ADP will host Investor Day on June 12, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss company strategies.

news.summary: AU10TIX, a prominent player in identity verification and fraud prevention worldwide, recently introduced continuous risk monitoring in New York on May 15, 2025. This feature allows businesses to efficiently identify emerging risks and combat evolving financial crimes. The company aims to enhance proactive measures against fraudulent activities with this initiative.
news.headline: AU10TIX launches continuous AML Risk Monitoring to detect emerging risks with premium data sources.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on May 15, 2025, Seafarer Exploration has launched its Sand Shark™ handheld metal discriminator for detecting metals. This device, traded under OTCQB as SFRX, has undergone extensive testing in labs and real-world environments. It has been confirmed as operational, solidifying its place in the market as the latest cutting-edge tool for metal detection by the company.
news.headline: Seafarer Exploration releases Sand Shark™ handheld device after successful testing in Tampa, Florida, May 15, 2025.

news.summary: With over 1,700 high-end properties offering exceptional amenities and tailored service, Vione Paros has been selected to be part of the exclusive SELECT Hotels & Resorts by Internova program by Internova Travel Group. This prestigious collection caters to guests seeking luxury experiences. The invitation marks a significant recognition of Vione Paros's superior quality in the hospitality industry.
news.headline: Vione Paros in Greece joins SELECT Hotels & Resorts program, with 1,700 luxury properties for guests.

news.summary: Senators who support cryptocurrency are working quickly to revive significant stablecoin legislation after it failed to pass last week.
news.headline: Senate stablecoin legislation failed last week, pro-crypto senators working to revive it.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in San Jose, California and Shanghai, Intalight™ revealed that they have attained the CE mark for their DREAM OCT™ platform. Intalight™ is known for their innovative ophthalmic technologies focusing on Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT). The CE mark certifies the compliance of the DREAM OCT™ platform with regulations set by the EU, providing official approval for its distribution and use. This milestone solidifies Intalight™'s position as a leading developer in the field.
news.headline: Intalight™ gets CE mark for DREAM OCT™ technology. Key dates: May 15, 2025. Leading in OCT, they focus on ophthalmic tech.

news.summary: Cizzle Brands Corporation (CZZL) has recently increased its reach in the United States by establishing multi-year sponsorship deals with the official USA Hockey affiliate organizations in Massachusetts, Minnesota, and Michigan. As per the agreements, CWENCH Hydration™ will serve as the Official Hydration B provider for Massachusetts Hockey. This move comes as part of Cizzle Brands' efforts to strengthen its presence in the US market. The company's stocks are traded on Cboe Canada under symbol CZZL, on OTCQB as CZZLF, and on Frankfurt as 8YF.
news.headline: Cizzle Brands partners with Massachusetts, Minnesota, and Michigan hockey organizations with CWENCH Hydration™.
Redfin: New listings are still rising, allowing some buyers to get deals.
Redfin: Pending US home sales fell 3.4% year over year during the 4 weeks ending May 11th.

news.summary: In Westbrook, Maine, on May 15, 2025, Synergy CHC Corp. (NASDAQ: SNYR), a leading provider of consumer health care and lifestyle goods, has disclosed its financial performance for the three-month period ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Synergy CHC Corp (NASDAQ: SNYR) reports growth in earnings per share for Q1 2025, marking 9 quarters of profitability.

news.summary: SolarBank Corporation, a leading renewable energy company, is set to announce its Q1 financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025, after Nasdaq market closes today. The company's stock information includes NASDAQ: SUUN, Cboe CA: SUNN, and FSE: GY2. Investors are encouraged to stay tuned for the latest updates.

news.summary: Received approval from the FDA regarding important details for the TSHA-102 pivotal Part B trial design, along with instructions on moving forward with study initiation.
news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies announces positive Q1 2025 results and progress in FDA alignment for TSHA-102 trial.

news.summary: Critical progress was achieved by the START Center for Cancer Research, a leader in community-based early-phase clinical trials, on May 15, 2025. This major milestone underscores START's dedication to providing innovative cancer treatments to patients. START, which is recognized as the world's largest early-phase community-based research facility, continues to drive advancements in cancer therapy.
news.headline: Moderna administers first dose of mRNA-4106 to US patient in phase 1 trial for solid tumors. Highlights START's commitment.

news.summary: During a presentation at ARVO, significant 12-month data from a Phase 1/2 trial was showcased, emphasizing the promise of OPGx-LCA5 gene therapy in revitalizing vision. The results suggest a notable achievement in vision restoration.

news.summary: Launching in May 2025, a limited-release small batch bourbon pays tribute to the legendary "Dirty Helen" Cromwell known for her rebellious spirit. Coming from LAWRENCEBURG, Ky., this expression is a homage to Jackson's full barrel win of 15-year-old bourbon in 2000.
news.headline: Old Commonwealth Distillery is reviving D.H. Cromwell 15 Year Bourbon as a limited-release in May 2025.

news.summary: Lucid successfully raised funds to extend their financial runway significantly beyond crucial upcoming reimbursement milestones. By the end of the first quarter of 2025, they had over $40 million in proforma cash. Veris Health also completed financing in the same quarter, allowing them to resume work on an implantable physiological monitor. Additionally, they are gearing up to announce their first commercial partnership very soon.
news.headline: PAVmed reports over $40 million proforma cash, Lucid secures capital, Veris Health resumes development of implantable monitor.

news.summary: AmpliTech Group has released its first-quarter financial results for the fiscal year 2025, indicating a positive outlook moving forward. The company reported record bookings during this period, along with significant advancements in their strategic intellectual property (IP) portfolio. These developments point towards a promising future for AmpliTech Group, showcasing strong growth potential.
news.headline: AmpliTech Group reports positive Q1 FY2025 with record bookings and strategic IP advancements.
